notes: Treat merge-queue utilization as a throughput target, not only as a repository setting.
Default to the proactive four-lane worker-slot posture described in Prompt Autonomy when safe actionable work exists.
Aim to keep at least two ready PRs available for queue admission while the queue is active.
Warn when active queue occupancy falls below 50% of the current effective inflight cap.
Paused queues are operationally exempt until the pause is lifted.
